description:
## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-checkbox

Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-checkbox` that were not fixed inline.

### Items
- [ ] LOW: The `WcCheckbox` type alias (line 344) could be removed in a future major version.
- [ ] LOW: Consider adding `@internal` support to the CEM analyzer config to auto-exclude private members from the manifest.

### Context
- Audit feature: `feature-1772817641456-h88glik8c`
- Files modified during audit: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-checkbox/hx-checkbox.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-checkbox/hx-checkbox.test.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-checkbox/hx-checkbox.stories.ts`
- Audit cost: $0.00
title: Post-Audit: hx-checkbox — follow-up items

descriptionHistory.description:
## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-checkbox

Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-checkbox` that were not fixed inline.

### Items
- [ ] LOW: The `WcCheckbox` type alias (line 344) could be removed in a future major version.
- [ ] LOW: Consider adding `@internal` support to the CEM analyzer config to auto-exclude private members from the manifest.

### Context
- Audit feature: `feature-1772817641456-h88glik8c`
- Files modified during audit: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-checkbox/hx-checkbox.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-checkbox/hx-checkbox.test.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-checkbox/hx-checkbox.stories.ts`
- Audit cost: $0.00
